turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Use the following information to write a single 30-word cv sentence for a senior data analyst experience at Alibaba, the sentence begins with "Gathered requirements, designed, and implemented data pipelines...": 
Develop and maintain data extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) pipelines to process large volumes of data from various sources. Acquire and integrate new data sources from third-party vendors to enhance the firm’s investment decision-making process.Perform comprehensive data analysis to identify trends, patterns, and potential investment opportunities, using advanced analytical tools and techniques. Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements and develop strategies to improve data quality, access, and usability within the organization.Transform unstructured data from vendors into structured formats, ensuring consistency and compatibility with internal systems and processes.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Gathered requirements, designed, and implemented data pipelines for Alibaba, developing and maintaining ETL processes, integrating new sources, performing comprehensive analysis with advanced tools, and collaborating with stakeholders to improve data quality and usability.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Tailor the following cv entry for the job at the bottom: 

•	Gathered requirements, designed, and implemented ETL data pipelines; integrated unstructured data from vendors, collaborated with stakeholders to improve data quality and usability;

Data Analyst

London
Are you passionate about data and want to transform raw data into meaningful insights for investment decisions? Aspect Capital is an award-winning systematic hedge fund based in London that manages over $10 billion of client assets, where data and technology play a critical role in the success of the business.
We are looking for a Data Analyst to join our centralised Data team. The team is responsible for sourcing, processing, transforming and distribution of data within the firm – an integral part of Aspect’s investment process. Currently, the team is at the beginning of a multi-year transformation to improve our big data processes, and as a Data Analyst within the team you would be directly contributing to this by both building out our ELT pipelines and designing requisite improvements. We believe the best way to learn is by doing and aim to have you making meaningful changes from the start.
Your responsibilities 
•	Gather requirements, design, and implement data pipelines for extraction, transformation and loading of data.
•	Source and acquire data (traditional and alternative) from third-party vendors.
•	Perform analysis of datasets (both internal and external) to generate insights and present findings to stakeholders.
•	Transforming raw data from vendors into structured format to be used in various internal processes.
Your experience
•	3+ years of work experience as Data Analyst or Business Data Analyst in relevant fields.
•	Solid understanding of relational databases (e.g., MS SQL), including building and deploying SQL.
•	Working experience with data models, database design development.
•	Strong analytical skills with the ability to collect, organise, analyse, and disseminate significant amounts of information with attention to detail and accuracy.
•	Ability to work independently as well as part of a team in various projects.
Nice to haves
•	Knowledge/practical experience of AGILE methodologies.
•	Demonstrated general knowledge of financial products and concepts e.g., FX, Equities, Options, Futures with significant experience in at least one asset class.
•	Experience in some programming languages e.g., Python or Matlab
•	Experience with cloud services e.g., AWS or Snowflake
•	Knowledge of data modelling concepts and how they apply to the Financial Domain

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Gathered requirements, designed, and implemented ETL data pipelines at Aspect Capital, transforming raw vendor data into structured formats, analyzing datasets for insights, and collaborating with stakeholders to enhance data quality and usability for informed investment decisions.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Develop and implement data pipelines to extract, transform, and load data for investment analysis, enhancing the efficiency of the multi-year big data transformation process.
2. Source and acquire traditional and alternative datasets from third-party vendors, expanding the firm's data resources to facilitate informed investment decisions.
3. Conduct comprehensive analyses of both internal and external datasets to identify trends, patterns, and potential investment opportunities in various asset classes.
4. Transform raw unstructured data into structured formats, ensuring compatibility with the firm's internal systems and processes.
5. Present insightful analysis findings to stakeholders, supporting the systematic investment strategies and decision-making process at Aspect Capital.
6. Collaborate with team members on various projects using AGILE methodologies to accelerate and streamline data-related initiatives.
7. Build and deploy SQL scripts for data extraction and manipulation, leveraging relational databases like MS SQL.
8. Develop data models and design databases to effectively store and manage large volumes of financial data.
9. Apply advanced programming languages, such as Python or Matlab, to analyze complex datasets and utilize cloud services like AWS or Snowflake for scalable data processing.
10. Utilize knowledge of financial products, concepts, and data modeling to optimize data-driven processes and strategies within the hedge fund's systematic trading approach.
